# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

kong:
  databases:
    redis:
      hosts:
        - 127.0.0.1
          port: 6379

  services:
    - name: service-a
      url: http://service-a-endpoint.com
      host: service-a
      connect_timeout: 2500
      protocol: "http"
      idle_connections: 100
      retries: 3
      request_termination_threshold: 2000

    - name: service-b
      url: http://service-b-endpoint.com
      host: service-b
      connect_timeout: 2500
      protocol: "http"
      idle_connections: 100
      retries: 3
      request_termination_threshold: 2000

  routes:
    - name: route-a
      service: service-a
      hosts:
        - host: api.example.com
          paths:
            - /api/v1/a/*

    - name: route-b
      service: service-b
      hosts:
        - host: api.example.com
          paths:
            - /api/v1/b/*
